programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Trainer whose Hoppip partners can predict the weather. But on the horizon, there are two storms approaching...and one of them goes by the name 'Team Rocket'!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Superhero Secret
programme.desc: The legendary superhero Gligarman grows old and is beginning to consider hanging up his cape. When Ash and friends wander into town, they bring with them a challenge that could be his final fight: Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Mild ‘N Wooly
programme.desc: When an unruly herd of Mareep ruin their lunch plans, our heroes decide to help their timid herder in time to compete in a local battle festival.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Wired For Battle
programme.desc: When the top student at a Pokémon training center loses interest in Pokémon battles, opting to build a comprehensive Pokémon database instead, it’s up to Ash to convince him that battling is not just about probability!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Good ‘Quil Hunting
programme.desc: When Ash finds a Cyndaquil in the wild, he is eager to catch it...but you can bet he’s not the only one!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: A Shadow Of A Drought
programme.desc: Arriving in Azalea Town, Ash carelessly provokes its residents, who adore SlowPoké. And things only look worse as Team Rocket arrives, meaning to snag every last SlowPoké! What can Ash do?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Going Apricorn
programme.desc: As he promised Professor Oak, Ash delivers the mysterious GS Ball to a renowned Poké Ball expert. But the fruits of his labor are almost spoiled when Team Rocket bursts onto the scene!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Gettin’ The Bugs Out
programme.desc: Ash has finally reached the Azalea Gym, but Cyndaquil isn’t quite fired up enough to take on the Gym Leader. As the battle heats up, Ash has to give his all to take on the powerful Bug-type Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: A Farfetch’d Tale
programme.desc: An inexperienced young Trainer has managed to scare off his own Farfetch’d. Our heroes are happy to help him out, but they'll have to find it before Team Rocket does!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Tricks Of The Trade
programme.desc: At an annual Pokémon trading festival, a young Trainer is looking for a good trade for his Wobbuffet. The Team Rocket trio are looking for opportunities as well, but both sets of Trainers get more than they bargain for!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Fire-Ing Squad!
programme.desc: An unexpected Pokémon firefighting competition reunites our heroes with some old friends, the Squirtle Squad! But they are in desperate need of some leadership, so Ash and Squirtle rejoin the ranks.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: No Big Woop!
programme.desc: When they stumble upon a preschool for Wooper and an emergency calls the teacher away, our heroes come to the rescue! But, as always, Team Rocket is around the corner and up to no good…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: On the way to Goldenrod City, our heroes are forced to head through a tunnel guarded by angry Onix. To make it more difficult, Team Rocket, Snubbull, and Jigglypuff drop in for a visit…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Hour Of Houndour
programme.desc: Following a string of mysterious thefts, our heroes discover some Houndour struggling to survive in the wild. To help these thieving Pokémon mend their ways, Ash and friends will first have to earn their trust.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Totodile Duel
programme.desc: Ash and Misty’s rivalry is reignited when they both try to capture a Totodile at the same time. Unable to see whose Poké Ball actually caught it, they decide a battle is the best way to decide Totodile’s new Trainer.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Hot Matches
programme.desc: When Ash hears of a virtually unbeatable Trainer nearby, he's itching to take on the challenge. But both Brock’s Vulpix and Ash’s Cyndaquil take a beating from her Skarmory, even with their type advantage! How can Ash defeat it?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Love, Totodile Style
programme.desc: Ash’s Totodile develops a crush on a passing Azumarill, the star performer of a Pokémon circus. When Team Rocket arrives to steal the show, Azumarill’s heart isn't the only thing Totodile has to win!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Ash has his sights set on a rare Noctowl with unusual coloring, but this clever Pokémon repeatedly uses Hypnosis to get the better of him! Will Ash be able to catch this Noctowl napping?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Forrest Grumps
programme.desc: A surprise attack from a group of Ursaring has our heroes and Team Rocket running for cover. In the chaos, the groups are split up, and the unenthusiastic pairings are forced to work together. But for how long?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Psychic Sidekicks
programme.desc: After seeing a sign in the forest warning them about mischievous Ghost-type Pokémon, our heroes reach a town whose residents use Psychic types to repel them. But soon some spooky news arrives: a giant Gengar is on the loose!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Fortune Hunters
programme.desc: A sudden craze in Pokémon fortune-telling turns out to be a plot to steal Pokémon from local Trainers. But Jessie, James and Meowth aren't behind it this time! Who are these con artists?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Arriving in Goldenrod City, Ash is ready for his next Gym battle, but the Gym appears to be closed. Their plans delayed, our heroes decide to explore the vibrant city.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After losing to Whitney at the Goldenrod Gym, Ash is thinking of a rematch with her powerful Miltank. When Whitney suggests a trip to a Miltank dairy, it’s just the chance he's is looking for!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: With his new Gym badge in hand, Ash is asked to appear on a local radio station. But while he's acting out a radio drama with some 'professional actors,' the scripted danger becomes all too lifelike!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Bug Pokémon Catching Contest turns into a hive of activity when Ash goes up against his rival Casey—and it isn’t long before the Team Rocket villains swarm the scene, intent on catching a few things for themselves…

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: On the way to Ecruteak City, our heroes are trapped on the wrong side of a river. To get across, they first have to find a Sudowoodo...which, even for an expert, is no easy feat!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When an ex-student of Professor Oak’s discovers some restored Omanyte and Omastar in the wild, our heroes are called into action to save these prehistoric Pokémon from harsh times with Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Pidgey Express courier service is in need of our heroes' helping hands, especially when Team Rocket wants to have the delivery Pidgey signed, sealed, and delivered to the Boss!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Caught in a sudden downpour, our heroes find a castle clinic that uses Pokémon healers to help patients. But when Brock and the doctor end up trapped in the castle's labyrinth, a helping hand is needed to get them out!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After meeting the elderly owner of a Pokémon dojo, Ash is called upon to replace the man's granddaughter as the chosen heir! But when a vicious challenger approaches, can Ash help defend the dojo from destruction?

programme.title: Backroad Bounty
programme.desc: Marty and Bam Bam visit a garbage man who has spent 40 years building his collection.

programme.title: Backroad Bounty
programme.desc: The boys head on out to a sea of abandoned boats where surprising deals are made.

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: When livestock hits the uShip auction, Jennifer makes her move and wins a haul of two bucking bulls, while Marc gets a fragile experimental aircraft. When this experienced cowgirl picks up the bulls, she finds them meaner than she expected.

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.desc: The Enterprise crew becomes embroiled in a local power struggle on a tribal planet.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia, una de las vendedoras del mercado, le cuenta todo a Jimena acerca de la muerte de Libia. Franco renuncia a su empleo con Eduvina, y ella le arma un escándalo a Rosario en el bar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena cree que Juan y Óscar quieren envenenarla a ella y a su hermana, tras golpear a su esposo, Norma la rescata en la calle. Franco es traicionado por Rosario y Eduvina intenta suicidarse.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llama a una ambulancia para salvar a Óscar, Juan confirma que las Elizondo saben todo sobre Libia. Eva confiesa lo que hizo y su rencor hacia Gabriela y revela el secreto de su hija.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan trata de sacar a Paula de su vida con dinero, pero ella no está dispuesta. Sofía intenta convencerla para que firme el acuerdo y se vayan las dos para siempre de la casa. Pedro y Julieta son descubiertos y se declara una guerra entre hermanos.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José traiciona a su hermano por dinero e intenta aliarse con Pedro para quitarle la administración de la hacienda. Sofía hace revelaciones a Paula sobre la identidad de su padre, para empujarla a tomar las decisiones que ella está tramando.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José reúne a todos los hermanos y se enfrenta a Juan porque quiere reemplazarlo. Julieta mantiene su posición con dignidad y no accede a hacer las paces con su marido, mientras Paula decide seguir insistiendo sin saber que una verdad la persigue.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La envidia termina por separar y enfrentar a los hermanos del Monte. Julieta entra a la casa de Sofía y Paula para destrozarla, sus acciones descontroladas tienen como desenlace el regreso de ellas a la hacienda, pero nadie imagina lo que sucederá.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gabriela es una minera que detecta fallas en la seguridad de la mina San Pedro. Antonia, la dueña del lugar, es una despiadada mujer que quiere que su hijo Alejandro se haga cargo del negocio. Gabriela y Alejandro quedan atrapados en un derrumbe.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro y Gabriela son rescatados por Tomás. El padre de la minera ahora está rico y no quiere que ella se arriesgue más en la mina. Alejandro se queda en San Pedro, visita a Gabriela y la ve saliendo de la ducha, provocando los celos de Fernando.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Tomás entrega su renuncia, pero antes, como jefe de los mineros, despide a Gabriela para evitar que muera en otro derrumbe. Ella vuelve a la mina y le pide su trabajo de vuelta a Alejandro. Él acepta, sin poder disimular lo que siente por ella.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia interroga al pequeño David para saber quién es su padre. Además, quiere investigar si el Tigre ha estado robando oro de su mina. Fernando tiene una horrible pesadilla en la que ve a su madre, la Patrona, asesinando a su padre, Marcos Beltrán.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llama a una ambulancia para salvar a Óscar, Juan confirma que las Elizondo saben todo sobre Libia. Eva confiesa lo que hizo y su rencor hacia Gabriela y revela el secreto de su hija.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma y Jimena llegan a la hacienda y se enteran de la traición de Eva, Fernando y Sara quieren denunciarla a ella y a los Reyes, mientras Gabriela retiene a sus hijas para protegerlas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Se arma una fuerte pelea cuando los Reyes llegan a la hacienda para hablar con Norma y Jimena. Eva se va de la hacienda por orden de Fernando y Raquel le prohíbe que se acerque a su hija Ruth.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick vaga por el bosque y encuentra a Gabriel, un párroco al que salvan de una horda de zombis y les permite pernoctar en su iglesia. Sin embargo, hay algo extraño en él y esa misma noche uno de los integrantes del grupo es secuestrado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Gareth y su grupo de caníbales atacan la iglesia mientras Rick y sus compañeros están en el bosque buscándolos para vengar a Bob. Además, el padre Gabriel confiesa el siniestro acto de su pasado que no deja descansar a su conciencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beth se despierta en un hospital de Atlanta, pero pronto se da cuenta de que los mismos que la auxiliaron y sanaron no la dejarán marchar. No obstante, su nuevo amigo, Noah, y ella tratan de huir del recinto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras se dirigen hacia el norte, el grupo se ve obligado a detenerse porque una horda de zombis bloquea el camino. La tensión aumenta y la situación termina por estallar cuando Eugene confiesa un secreto que había ocultado a todos hasta ahora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Daryl persiguen a los captores de Beth por una Atlanta devastada, pero su auto se queda sin gasolina y deben pasar la noche en un refugio para mujeres.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick busca una salida pacífica al conflicto, pero sus enemigos la rechazan y prefieren zanjar las cosas de forma violenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El vehículo se avería y el grupo continúa a pie hacia Washington D. C., pero les sorprende una tormenta y buscan cobijo en un granero, donde encuentran algo totalmente inesperado e inquietante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Paulie Ayala vs Johnny Tapia 1
programme.desc: On June 26th, 1999, Paulie Ayala fought Johnny Tapia for the WBA Bantamweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In what was the 1999 Ring Magazine Fight of the Year, the two men put on a show that ended with an Ayala unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Randall Bailey vs Mike Jones
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2012 Randall Bailey and Mike Jones fought for vacant IBF World welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas that ended in the 11th round by knockout resulting in a victory for Bailey.

programme.title: Ray Mancini vs Arturo Frias
programme.desc: On May 8th, 1982 Ray Mancini and Arturo Frias fought for the WBA World Lightweight title at the Aladdin in Las Vegas with what was supposed to be a 15 round bout ending in the first by technical knockout securing the victory for Ray Mancini.

programme.title: Ray Mancini vs Orlando Romero
programme.desc: On September 15th, 1983 Ray Mancini fought Orlando Romero for the WBA World Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York with the bout ending in the ninth round by knockout earning Mancini the win.

programme.title: Ray Mercer vs Bert Cooper
programme.desc: On August 5th, 1990 Ray Mercer faced Bert Cooper for Heavyweight titles at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City with the bout ending by unanimous decision in favor of Mercer.

programme.title: Ray Mercer vs Tommy Morrison
programme.desc: On October 18th, 1991 Ray Mercer faced Tommy Morrison for the WBO World Heavyweight titles at the Convention Center in Atlantic City ending in technical knockout by Mercer earning him the victory and title but, he relinquished the title shortly after.

programme.title: Rob Brant vs Ryota Murata 1
programme.desc: On October 20th, 2018 Rob Brant faced Ryota Murata for a second time for the WBA World Middleweight title at the Park Theater in Las Vegas that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Brant.

programme.title: Robeisy Ramirez vs Abraham Nova
programme.desc: On June 18th, 2022, Robeisy Ramirez and Abraham Nova fought for the IBF USBA & WBO Global Featherweight titles at Madison Square Garden resulting in a knockout victory for Robeisy Ramirez.

programme.title: Robeisy Ramirez vs Brandon Valdes
programme.desc: On December 12th, 2020, Robeisy Ramirez fought Brandon Valdes in a featherweight bout in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Ramirez showed his impressive speed and natural power, stopping Valdes in the sixth round.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Davey Moore
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1983 Roberto Duran fought Davey Moore for the WBA World Super welterweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York Moore was knocked down in the 7th round giving the win to Duran.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Iran Barkley
programme.desc: On February 24th, 1989, Roberto Duran fought Iran Barkley for the WBC Middleweight Title in Atlantic City. Duran, known for his relentless aggression, defeated Barkley by a close split decision in what was named The Ring Fight of the Year for 1989.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Jimmy Batten
programme.desc: On November 12th, 1982 Roberto Duran faced Jimmy Batten at the Orange Bowl in Miami, Fl. It ended in an unanimous decision victory for Duran.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Sugar Ray Leonard 1
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1989 Roberto Duran and Sugar Ray Leonard fought for the first time for the WBC World Super Middleweight at the Mirage Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Leonard.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, when Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jep and Jessica move into Willie and Jase's neighborhood, Jep is sidelined with an illness.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase receives a palate of fireworks as a gift, he and the guys create a homemade fireworks display for the Robertson family 4th of July barbeque. Meanwhile, Uncle Si is honored by the veterans association.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Phil and Jase get into an argument about which type of duck decoy works best, Jase and the guys repaint some old decoys, betting that Phil cannot tell the difference.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys discover they have a knack for removing pests from other people's property, they use their new talents to their advantage. Meanwhile, Willie gives Sadie and John Luke summer jobs at his diner.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When an office prank war spirals out of control, Phil volunteers Willie, Jase, and Jep to help Alan at the church, which seems more like a punishment than charity work.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the guys spend the weekend at a hunting cabin to celebrate Martin's bachelor party, things turn explosive after they find a cache of antique black powder weapons. Meanwhile, Willie helps Kay fulfill her lifelong dream of owning a petting zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Uncle Si has a brush with death, he creates a bucket list and asks the guys to help him fulfill his dreams. Meanwhile, Kay sets out to prove to Willie and Alan that she actually graduated high school.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Duck Commander sponsors a NASCAR race, Jase and the guys get themselves in the mood by attempting to work as a pit crew. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie challenge John Luke and his fiance Mary Kate to a doubles tennis match.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers have delivered the fragile 135-foot derrick to the new MGM exploration site, but before it can be erected, they must also transport the 80-ton substructure that will form its base.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Bear and Eric must haul a boiler and a flare stack--two critical pieces of equipment--to Langley at the same time that a polar bear is spotted in the area. In this region of the Arctic.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: After being Med-Evaced to Yellowknife hospital, Alex receives a grim diagnosis that could mean the end of his Ice Road season.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Research site before the ice road melts, but while scientists are on the verge of a historic breakthrough, the truckers are starting to haul away equipment piece-by-piece.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With the sun beating down on the ice, the road is melting at an accelerating rate. This means that it's all hands on deck for the demobilization of the drilling sites at Langley and Mallik, which must be broken down.

programme.title: Ax Men: Falling Fast
programme.desc: It's only the second week into the logging season, but it seems like the teams could already use a break. In Alaska, the Papac team fights to find a replacement to fill the shoes of injured Coatsy.

programme.title: Ax Men: Failure to Communicate
programme.desc: It's week three, and the loggers are feeling the pressure to produce. In Alaska, Coatsy is still out of commission, so Papac institutes an extremely dangerous process called Shotgun Logging.

programme.title: Ax Men: The Swampman Cometh
programme.desc: Shelby the Swampman uses an airboat to search for a treasure trove of century old logs in a legendary lost canal. In Washington, Rygaard tries to haul out the biggest log on their site, a mammoth six-ton cypress.

programme.title: Ax Men: High Wire Act
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Shelby looks to repair his custom made two-ton swamp buggy. In Alaska, Coatsy returns to the Papac worksite. In the Pacific Northwest, the Rygaard crew must climb over a hundred feet in the air to top a new lift tree.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world where they are no larger than an alien child's play toy. Suddenly the smallest household nuisances are the Autobots' biggest threats!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Thought to be extinct, four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes. When their team leader Aleta-1 is captured, Megatron uses her to force Optimus Prime to surrender himself.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub, "Dancitron" opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons. After his break-dancing crew gets run off by the club's security, Raoul gets some backup from his trusted Autobot friends.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high… even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high... even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power. Using a molecule-freezing device to take Megatron and Starscream out of the picture, the two are free to lead how they see fit.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal, who have been forced into slave labor by Deceptitron. Seaspray arrives with the Autobots rescue team, and discovers much more than he was planning on.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Scavengers find a most unexpected relic, even as their mysterious Mini-­‐Cons make their escape and their even more unexpected pursuer, Starscream, arrives on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Starscream gloats over his impending victory, unaware that Optimus Prime has arrived to help the remaining Autobots. After being surprised by, and taken over by, the Mini-­‐Cons, the heroes ally with the Mini-­‐Cons, who share their secrets with the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Starscream tries to absorb the power of six of the Mini-­‐Cons, but needs the seventh to obtain the ultimate power he craves for his revenge.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Bumblebee, still relaxing after the Autobots' triumph over Starscream, feels his team can tackle any issue that might come up.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Bumblebee struggles to bring his out-of-practice team to combat readiness as they square off against the missiles and oil barrel traps of Stunticon Heatseeker.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The evil Decepticons have appeared in Detroit. With the all powerful Allspark, Megatron can use it to turn all of Earth's robots into Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: While working on a space bridge, the Autobots and their leader, Optimus Prime, find the AllSpark. After an epic battle between their ship and Megatron, they crash land on Earth in the city of Detroit.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots continue to fight off Megatron and the evil Decepticons. Eventually, the team assumes heroic roles in Detroit City.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Autobots must save Detroit from Starscream, when he kidnaps Bumblebee, Fanzone and Isaac Sumdac for ransom to get the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots set up base at an old auto-parts shop. Meanwhile, Megatron's head comes back online and takes control of several robots to attack the Autobots and reclaim the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: An engineering genius tampers with Bumblebee's system and causes him to become Meltdown. This wouldn't be half bad except for the fact that Meltdown's touch burns holes in the Autobots.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard invades WOW - Women Of Wrestling demanding a Championship Title Match. Champion Santana Garrett lets Tessa know she better get in line.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: With her father physically assaulted by Tessa Blanchard, Santana Garrett vows that the Championship is now second to her personal issues with The Born Legend.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Beast demands her shot at the WOW World Championship. Current Champion Santana Garrett’s eyes remain locked on revenge against Tessa Blanchard. And Tessa provides an exclusive interview that explains her reasons for attacking Santana’s father.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Champion Santana Garrett wants revenge on Tessa Blanchard for what she did to her beloved father. Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard gets what she wants… a shot at the Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Psycho Sister Razor has her debut match against Faith The Lioness. Plus, following the unprecedented Triple Threat Match, the most prestigious prize in women’s wrestling, the WOW World Championship Title, is decided tonight!

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Norwegian Nightmare, Nikki Krampus makes her long-awaited debut. Beaten in a back alley, Keta Rush seeks revenge against her assailant The Dagger. But Keta soon finds that to succeed she will have to fight off the more than just The Dagger.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: A new Champion in WOW is coming to terms with the fact the bullseye of her competitors is now squarely focused on her. Havok, The Monster Of Madness emerges as a threat to the WOW roster.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Dedicated to her ambition of never quitting, Stephy Slays demonstrates perseverance in an extraordinary match against The Disciplinarian. The smart ending will be unforgettable. Meanwhile, Tessa Blanchard takes her biggest risk since joining WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard is the new WOW World Champion, and The Beast, Jungle Grrrl, and Havok The Monster Of Madness have lined up to challenge the Champion. A Triple Threat Number One Contender Match will decide who will wrestle Tessa Blanchard.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard seemingly conspires with World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez to handpick her Championship opponent ...WOW’s newest competitor, Mexico’s high flying Luchadora Serpentine.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly's old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly's best friend.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie lose the iCarly URL to Nevel, he demands Carly kiss him if she wants their URL back. Meanwhile, Spencer has fun with the two hundred pillows he accidentally ordered.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam and Freddie both win a contest for the best locker in school, they are forced to share the same locker. Meanwhile, Carly asks Spencer to give her art lessons.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie present iCarly Awards for best user-generated content, giving the awards to the winners live on the web show. Spencer enlists European swimsuit models to help him make the awards statuettes.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie tries to prove that Melanie, Sam's twin sister, is just Sam in disguise. Meanwhile, when Carly tutors Spencer's nemesis, Chuck, Spencer tries to convince her that Chuck is evil.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: 13-year-old Carly Shay and her friends, Sam and Freddie, create a homemade Web show called iCarly. With Freddie behind the camera and Carly and Sam hosting the show, you never know what to expect!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam accidentally reveals to Carly that she and Freddie shared a secret kiss, Carly confronts them both about why they never told her about it. Meanwhile, Spencer goes to prison to teach an art class to convicts.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie defeat a famous TV chef in a cooking challenge, the chef gives up cooking, quits his show, and refuses to come out of his bedroom. Spencer tries to make his vision of the future a reality.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie accidentally get Principal Franklin fired, Miss Briggs and Mr. Howard take control and enforce harsh rules. Meanwhile, Spencer hires a grizzled old rodeo star to teach him to ride a mechanical bull.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam announces a "take Carly to the dance contest" for an upcoming Girls' Choice dance, so many boys show up that Carly, Sam, and Freddie have to hold a speed-dating session to meet them all.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie agree to make a music video for a pop star who's trying to make a comeback, they discover that she is out of shape and untalented. Spencer has trouble dating a woman when he discovers she's Gibby's mom.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Freddie saves Carly's life, Carly falls in love with him. Meanwhile, Sam and Spencer compete against each other in a paintball game called Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Gibby discovers Freddie and his girlfriend in a compromising position, he vows revenge and challenges Freddie to a fight. Meanwhile, Spencer's art career really takes off when the local paper incorrectly reports his death.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When the gang discovers that Lewbert was once a happy man engaged to a beautiful woman, they set out to reunite the lost lovers. Spencer joins the building watch to catch a thief that's been stealing from the apartments.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam reveals to Carly and Freddie that she used to compete in pageants as a young girl. When she learns that her long-time rival will be competing in Seattle, she convinces Carly to compete against her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam ends up in jail, Carly and Freddie vow that the web show must go on. They try to enlist Spencer's help at that last minute but he has a date he can't cancel.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: An eccentric billionaire asks the iCarly gang to perform the first live web show from outer space. They go through a series of tests to make sure they're fit for space travel. Back at the loft, Spencer is visited by a mysterious little girl.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Bigfoot fever hits Seattle when hikers take some fuzzy footage of a suspicious figure in the woods. After an expert validates the footage on the web show, Carly convinces the gang to go upstate and join the search for Bigfoot.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Fed up with his Mom constantly treating him like a baby, Freddie decides to move out into his own place. The gang starts a successful pet photography business. They end up in a feud with a rival pet photo studio.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When a heatwave hits Seattle and the power goes out, Spencer comes to the rescue with a Norwegian air conditioner.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer tries to surprise Carly for her birthday and ends up burning down her bedroom instead. But when the insurance company hands him a big check, he has a chance to make it up to her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After an iCarly fan proposes to his girlfriend live on the web show, the gang gets roped into going to the wedding. But when the bride gets cold feet, Carly must come to the rescue.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang goes into business making and selling Penny-Tees. After sales go through the roof, Sam recruits 4th-graders to help make shirts. But Carly, Sam, & Freddie disagree about how to treat them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Ridiculed for never pulling a prank, Carly recruits Spencer's help to prank Sam and Freddie. But after Spencer gets a taste for it, he can't stop pranking. The gang must figure out how to stop him.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After fighting with her mom, Sam moves in with Carly, who soon realizes she's a horrible guest. Freddie is stalked by a dangerous criminal after catching him on video committing a crime.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When a video of Nevel yelling at a little girl surfaces on the internet, Nevel becomes hated by everyone. After celebrating Nevel's demise, the iCarly gang then works to restore his honor after Nevel begs them for help.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang decides to hire an intern for the web series. Carly and Sam hire a guy they think is cute, but the new intern proves to be more trouble than he's worth. Freddy has to prove to Carly and Sam that they're better off without him.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang spends the night finishing their projects at Ridgeway during the annual school lock-in. Carly and Freddie start to suspect that Sam might have a crush on their new friend Brad.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iPilot: When Miss Briggs rejects all their favorite contestants from talent show tryouts, Carly and Sam decide to host their talented classmates on their own online web show, iCarly.
